annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under N.M. Stat. Ann. § 56-8-4 — 8.75% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). If the judgment is based on tortious conduct, bad faith, or intentional or willful acts, post-judgment interest is 15% (not 8.75%); plaintiff… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
